data.title: HII completes sea trials for USS Zumwalt (DDG 1000) after extensive modernization; Navy's first CPS platform.
data.description: In Pascagoula, Mississippi on January 21, 2026, HII’s Ingalls Shipbuilding division announced the successful completion of builder’s sea trials for USS Zumwalt (DDG 1000). The extensive modernization availability led to the Navy's first Conventional Prompt Strike (CPS) platform. The Ingalls and Navy team conducted a thorough series of at-sea tests to ensure the ship's readiness for its duties. The ship is traded on NYSE under the symbol HII.

data.title: Stolt-Nielsen Limited (Oslo Børs: SNI) to present Q4 and full year 2025 results on Jan 28, 2026 at 15:00 CET.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, Stolt-Nielsen Limited (Stock symbol: SNI) announced a forthcoming presentation regarding its unaudited performance in the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The event is scheduled for Wednesday, January 28, 2026, at 15:00 CET (09:00 EST, 14:00 GMT). The presentation will delve into the company's financial results for the mentioned periods, providing insights into its operations and outcomes. Stakeholders and interested parties can participate in this event to gain a comprehensive understanding of Stolt-Nielsen Limited's performance throughout the fourth quarter and full year of 2025.

data.title: Strategy Inc. purchased $3.38 billion in Bitcoin. They shifted from convertible bonds to perpetual preferred stock.
data.description: Strategy Inc. invested $3.38 billion in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) over a two-week period, with a notable balance sheet restructuring also taking place. This restructuring saw perpetual preferred stock surpass convertible bonds in terms of weight on the balance sheet for the first time. The percentage of convertible debt in relation to Bitcoin holdings decreased from 9.67% to 9.18% since the beginning of the year. Conversely, perpetual preferred shares, such as STRC, saw an increase from 9.19% to 9.36%. This shift is crucial as convertible bonds come with expiration dates, requiring repayment or refinancing, potentially posing challenges during market downturns. On the other hand, perpetual preferred shares do not mature, only requiring dividend payments without principal repayment or refinancing deadlines. This move signifies a strategic maneuver by Strategy Inc. in managing its financial obligations amidst market fluctuations.

data.title: Summitas wins "Overall Technology Solution-Latin America" at Miami Family Wealth Report Awards 2026.
data.description: In Miami on January 21, 2026, Summitas, a top client engagement platform, was honored as the winner in the 'Overall Technology Solution – Latin America' category at the Miami Family Wealth Report Awards 2026 program. This recognition highlights the platform's excellence in serving the needs of families in a rapidly evolving global and multi-generational landscape.

data.title: Lawsuit filed against A.I. recruitment tool company for ratings akin to credit agencies, demanding legal oversight.
data.description: A lawsuit that was recently filed argues that the ratings given by artificial intelligence screening software are comparable to those provided by credit agencies and therefore should be regulated under the same laws. The legal action highlights the importance of overseeing the ratings given by A.I. software to ensure fairness and accuracy.

data.title: Banner Public Affairs is hosting a virtual policy briefing on Critical Minerals and Advanced Manufacturing. Washington, Jan 21, 2026. Launching Banner Briefings.
data.description: Launch of Banner Briefings, a virtual discussion series on national policy issues, was marked by an event in Washington on January 21, 2026. Banner Public Affairs (Banner) will be hosting a virtual policy briefing titled "Banner Briefing: Critical Minerals and Advanced Manufacturing." This initiative aims to address crucial policy matters through engaging discussions.

data.title: ADLM launches data science program for lab professionals; aims to utilize healthcare data.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, the Association for Diagnostics & Laboratory Medicine (ADLM) revealed the introduction of the Data Science in Laboratory Medicine Certificate Program. This program aims to aid clinical laboratory professionals and pathologists in utilizing healthcare data effectively.

data.title: Telix Pharmaceuticals reports $804 million in full-year revenue, with a 46% increase in Q4 revenue reaching $208 million.
data.description: Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited reported its fiscal 2025 revenue of approximately $804 million, meeting its upgraded guidance of $800-$820 million. The company saw a significant 46% year-over-year increase in fourth-quarter revenue, totaling around $208 million. The Precision Medicine business generated about $161 million in revenue, showing a 4% quarter-over-quarter growth. Telix is making progress with its clinical studies, treating international patients in the ProstACT Global Phase 3 study and SOLACE Phase 1 study in the U.S. They also dosed the first patient in the U.S. in the BiPASS Phase 3 trial. Telix stock is at lows, possibly due to testing lower boundaries.

data.title: Greene County Bancorp, Inc. declares $0.10 per share cash dividend, maintaining annual rate at $0.40 per share.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, Greene County Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ-GCBC) based in Catskill, New York, disclosed that its Board of Directors sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per share for the company's common stock. This represents an annual cash dividend rate of $0.40 per share, mirroring the rate set in the previous quarter.

data.title: Company submits official proxy materials & sends message to shareholders via mail.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that over 2,000 new cases of COVID-19 have been recorded in the past 24 hours. This marks a significant increase from previous days, bringing the total number of confirmed cases in the country to more than 50,000. Additionally, there have been 15 new deaths reported, bringing the total number of fatalities to 750. Authorities are urging the public to continue following safety protocols and guidelines to curb the spread of the virus.
